# Elicitation Pack

Open questions grouped **by whom to ask**, so the BA can run a workshop or
interview per stakeholder instead of hunting through the draft. Same `Q#`/`A#`
IDs as the draft and Answer Sheet — answer here or there, then apply with
`/clarify:improve answers`. Answered items are removed on refresh.

## How to use
1. Book time with each stakeholder group below.
2. Walk their questions; capture answers next to the IDs.
3. Paste the filled Answer Sheet (or this pack with answers) back via
   `/clarify:improve answers`.

---

## <Stakeholder: e.g. Product Owner>
| ID | Question | Why it matters / context | Related section |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Q1 | <…> | <decision it blocks / risk if unanswered> | <§…> |

| --- | --- | --- | --- |

## Assumptions to confirm (quick pass per owner)
- **A1** (`ask: <owner>`) — ASSUMPTION: <…> — confirm or override.
